title: Heaven Dimension
description: A new peaceful dimension with new biomes and structures. Fly up with elytra to teleport!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qkvWzCO6Aj0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**How to teleport:**

_Go at Y = 360 (or Y = 300 for 1.17/1.16)_ with Elytra and Fireworks.
Fly up diagonally so you don't fall when you teleport!
If you fall from the dimension, you teleport back to the overworld.

---
**Command:**

_/execute in heaven:sky run tp ~ ~ ~_

---

**Meta of the game:**

After getting the elytra from The End, you are given the opportunity to explore a peaceful dimension where it's always day without hostile mobs to ruin your base or kill you. It's a very end-game dimension rewarding you for finding the elytra (since its almost the only way to go to Y = 360), and making it home safely. Explore the deep forests and the glorious villages.
Have fun playing my datapack :D

**Features**

Advancements

Villages with OP loot

Arrows that ignore the law of gravity

Always day

No hostile mobs

Animals spawn such as: Bees, pandas, parrots, pigs, etc..

Vibrant grass/leaves

Amazing generation

Unique trees

Flowers everywhere!

---

Join our Discord Server:
https://discord.com/invite/HbewtpwKgt

Give feedback and ideas, be updated when new things are added, have access to exclusive datapacks

**Credits:**

Massive help from Tando (TandoYT) in building most village houses and being amazing
